parameters.name: orientbounds
parameters.label: Orient Bounds
parameters.description: Available only when an input is connected to the Box to set bounds for the box. When Orient Bounds = On it will rotate the geometry to match the orientation of the input used for bounds.

parameters.name: modifybounds
parameters.label: Modify Bounds
parameters.description: Available only when an input is connected to the Box to set bounds for the box. When Modify Bounds = On to enable the transform parameters below to further modify the position and scale of the bounds.

parameters.name: rord
parameters.label: Rotate Order
parameters.description: Sets the order in which the rotations are applied.

parameters.name: s
parameters.label: Scale
parameters.description: Adjusts the uniform scale of the box.

parameters.name: anchoru
parameters.label: Anchor U
parameters.description: Set the point in X about which the geometry is positioned, scaled and rotated.

parameters.name: anchorv
parameters.label: Anchor V
parameters.description: Set the point in Y about which the geometry is positioned, scaled and rotated.

parameters.name: anchorw
parameters.label: Anchor W
parameters.description: Set the point in Z about which the geometry is positioned, scaled and rotated.

parameters.name: dodivs
parameters.label: Use Divisions
parameters.description: If checked, it divides the box into the number of Divisions specified below. Boxes divided in this way do not appear when rendered because the Divisions consist of open polygons.

parameters.name: rebar
parameters.label: Enforcement Bars
parameters.description: Places four diagonal crossbars in each division of the Box.

parameters.name: consolidatepts
parameters.label: Consolidate Corner Points
parameters.description: Merges the corner points together.  Instead of the box being composed of 6 separate faces (resulting in 4 points per corner and a total of 24 points), the corner points are merged together and the box

parameters.name: texture
parameters.label: Texture Coordinates
parameters.description: Determines how the texture coordinates are applied to the box.

parameters.name: normals
parameters.label: Compute Normals
parameters.description: Checking this option on will compute surface normals.

parameters.name: tz
parameters.label: Tz
parameters.description: These X,Y, and Z Values determine where the center of the Box is located.

parameters.name: sizez
parameters.label: Sizez
parameters.description: Size of the Box or Cube along the X, Y, and Z axes.

parameters.name: rz
parameters.label: Rz
parameters.description: These three fields rotate the Box along the X, Y, and Z axes.

parameters.name: divsz
parameters.label: Divsz
parameters.description: The number of divisions in X, Y, and Z to split this Box into.

examples.label: Configure Reverse Anchors and Sizex
examples.code:
n = op('box1')
n.par.reverseanchors = True
n.par.sizex = 2
n.par.sizey = 0.5
examples.description: Common settings from 87 real Derivative examples
